mapper.update: DELETE FROM hm_query.seller_dashboard_flat WHERE seller_id IN ( SELECT id FROM hm_seller.sellers WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM hm_supplier.supplier) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.seller_dashboard_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, seller_id, business_name, store_name, seller_status, contact_email, contact_phone, gst_verified, pan_verified, bank_account_verified, health_score, rating, fulfillment_rate ) SELECT s.id, s.tenant, NOW(), s.id, s.store_name, s.store_name, s.state_id, s.email, s.phone, CASE WHEN s.kyc_status = 'VERIFIED' THEN true ELSE false END, false, false, 0, 0, 0 FROM hm_seller.sellers s WHERE s.id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM hm_supplier.supplier) AND s.id NOT IN (SELECT seller_id FROM hm_query.seller_dashboard_flat) ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET last_synced_at = NOW(), store_name = EXCLUDED.store_name, seller_status = EXCLUDED.seller_status, contact_email = EXCLUDED.contact_email, contact_phone = EXCLUDED.contact_phone, gst_verified = EXCLUDED.gst_verified
mapper.update: UPDATE hm_query.seller_dashboard_flat sdf SET rating = COALESCE(sp.avg_rating, sdf.rating), fulfillment_rate = sdf.fulfillment_rate, last_synced_at = NOW() FROM hm_seller_lifecycle.seller_performance_metrics sp WHERE sp.seller_id = sdf.seller_id
